overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The player navigates from a street corner past a fuel station, crosses busy intersections with moderate traffic, passes a distinctive burger restaurant, and approaches a massive industrial complex featuring spherical storage tanks and a towering skyscraper marked '06' under bright midday sun.

events.description: camera turns right from street corner and begins walking forward along sidewalk

metal public bench on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city street corner with the camera turning right to follow the sidewalk. Elevated monorail tracks curve overhead while the massive '06' tower dominates the distant skyline. The player walks past a fuel station with a prominent blue neon sign, sharing the sidewalk with sparse pedestrians and passing a street bench.

segments.scene_description: The player exits the initial sidewalk onto a crosswalk, entering a commercial zone featuring the distinctive BuryGer fast-food restaurant with its massive rotating burger sign. The spherical industrial tanks become visible in the distance as the player crosses the street with a moderate crowd, while the '06' tower grows larger in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with industrial complex and heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: waiting for multiple vehicles including trucks and sports cars to pass through intersection
resuming walk across MLK Blvd intersection toward industrial tank complex

agents.ego_description: navigating busy intersection with moderate traffic, heading toward industrial area with spherical tanks

teal sports car driving through the crosswalk area

elevated industrial walkway with red warning lights spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the major intersection at MLK Blvd, navigating through moderate traffic including armored trucks and sports cars. The industrial zone with massive spherical tanks and an elevated walkway bridge dominates the view ahead. Street signs mark the transition from commercial to industrial district as the '06' tower looms closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with spherical storage tanks and towering skyscraper

steam or smoke visible rising from industrial structures near spherical tanks

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the industrial architecture, looking up at the massive tower and spherical tanks

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the industrial plaza dominated by three massive spherical storage tanks and the imposing '06' tower. The camera pans upward to take in the scale of the skyscraper against the blue sky, while steam rises from nearby industrial pipes. Sparse pedestrians stand observing the architecture, and the elevated monorail track frames the tower from above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling city street corner into the heart of a massive industrial plaza. It begins by turning right along a sidewalk beneath curving monorail tracks, passing a fuel station with a blue neon sign while the distant '06' tower looms on the skyline. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a commercial zone featuring a BuryGer restaurant with a rotating burger sign, with the '06' tower growing larger in the frame as the player enters a crowded crosswalk. The perspective then navigates through the moderate traffic of a major intersection at MLK Blvd, where armored trucks and sports cars pass by as the environment transitions from commercial storefronts to an industrial district. Finally, the camera reaches an open plaza dominated by three massive spherical storage tanks and the imposing '06' tower, panning upward to capture the skyscraper's scale against a blue sky as steam rises from nearby pipes.
